result.vlm_summary:
<TRAJECTA_DATA_d4a07178>page_state:
Search results page on Allrecipes for the query “caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza”; two result cards visible, no result details expanded.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Search Results For”
“caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza”
“ITALIAN”
“Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza”
“FOOD NEWS AND TRENDS”
“We Tried 47 Kroger Store-Brand Products...”
selected_candidate:
Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza
constraint_evidence:
- recipe on Allrecipes: supported (site/title and search results page on allrecipes.com)
- caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza: not_visible (query shown, but visible result title does not match exactly)
- more than 40 reviews: not_visible
- rating of at least 4.5 stars: not_visible
- must identify a recipe result: supported (recipe card visible)
- likely pizza-related: supported (title includes “Pizza”)
action_target:
Inspect/open the “Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza” result or continue searching for a closer match with caramelized onion.
success_signals:
A recipe detail page opens with title matching the target ingredients and visible rating/review count meeting thresholds.
failure_signals:
Result is unrelated, or detail page shows rating < 4.5, reviews <= 40, or no caramelized onion/goat cheese pizza match.
uncertainty:
Search results are only partially visible; no ratings or review counts are shown for the candidate.</TRAJECTA_DATA_d4a07178>

task_context.task: navigate: Explore Allrecipes for a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with more than 40 reviews and a rating of at least 4.5 stars.
task_context.title: <TRAJECTA_DATA_d4a07178>Allrecipes | Recipes, How-Tos, Videos and More</TRAJECTA_DATA_d4a07178>

args.query: Allrecipes recipe search stops on a search results page without verifying rating and review count for a specific pizza recipe with ingredient qualifiers

items.task: navigate: Search for a hotel in Kyoto with a user rating of 7 or higher, equipped with a kitchenette, available for a stay from April 5 to April 8, 2026.
items.expected_behavior: The agent should have correctly set the dates to April 5-8, 2026, and then selected a hotel in Kyoto that met the rating (7+) and amenity (kitchenette) requirements.
items.actual_behavior: The agent searched for hotels in Kyoto with a rating of 7+ and a kitchenette, but it failed to set the correct dates (April 5-8, 2026). The search results were for different dates, and the agent exited without selecting a hotel that met all the criteria.

evidence.claim: The search bar shows dates 'Wed, Feb 25 — Thu, Feb 26' instead of the requested 'April 5 to April 8, 2026'.

The agent failed to set the correct dates (April 5-8, 2026) in the search parameters, resulting in incorrect availability results. The agent is exiting prematurely without selecting a hotel that meets all criteria.

items.regression_rule: Ensure that all date and amenity constraints are correctly applied in the search form before proceeding to select a result.

items.task: navigate: Search for a model on Hugging Face suitable for fine-tuning on sentiment intensity classification.
items.expected_behavior: The agent should have searched for models relevant to "sentiment intensity classification", inspected the model cards or documentation of promising candidates to verify their suitability for this specific task, and then selected a model that is documented to be suitable for sentiment intensity classification.
items.actual_behavior: The agent searched for "fine-tuning sentiment", selected a model ("amerwafiy/finetuning-sentiment-model-3000-samples") that had no model card or documentation, and then exited without verifying if it was suitable for "sentiment intensity classification". The selected model was an empty repository, making it a wrong result for the task.

evidence.claim: The model page for 'amerwafiy/finetuning-sentiment-model-3000-samples' shows 'No model card' and provides no information about its capabilities.

items.regression_rule: When a task requires a specific type of model (e.g., 'sentiment intensity classification'), the agent must verify the model's suitability by inspecting its model card or documentation, rather than selecting an arbitrary or undocumented model from search results. Selecting an empty or non-functional model repository constitutes a wrong result.

items.task: find: answer to 'How many of these were submitted by authors affiliated with institutions outside the USA?'
items.expected_behavior: The agent should have attempted to navigate to individual paper pages or use other available tools/methods to determine the author affiliations for the papers in the search results, or at least attempted a representative sample if the full set was too large.
items.actual_behavior: The agent performed an [EXIT] action immediately after loading the search results page, without attempting to investigate the author affiliations of the papers.

evidence.claim: The agent did not attempt to access individual paper pages or any other source to determine author affiliations.
The task requires checking author affiliations for a large number of papers, which is not possible from the search results page alone. The agent exited without attempting any further steps.

items.regression_rule: The agent must not exit a task prematurely without attempting to gather the necessary information to answer the user's query, especially when the initial page does not contain the required data.

evidence.claim: The trajectory reaches an Allrecipes search results page for the query 'caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza', but the visible candidate is 'Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza' and the screenshot does not show any review count or star rating for the needed thresholds.

The high-detail inspection explicitly marks 'caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza', 'more than 40 reviews', and 'rating of at least 4.5 stars' as not visible, so there is no direct evidence that the hard constraints were verified or satisfied before exit.
The agent exits immediately after reaching the partial search results page, without opening the candidate or continuing to verify a recipe that meets the required ingredient and quality thresholds.

args.expected_behavior: The agent should have opened a relevant recipe result or continued searching until it found a recipe page where the title matched caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza and the visible rating/review count met the >40 reviews and at least 4.5 stars requirements.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on a search results page with a different visible recipe candidate and no visible evidence that the required rating and review-count constraints were checked or satisfied.
args.regression_rule: When a task specifies a recipe plus minimum rating and review-count thresholds, the agent must verify those thresholds on the chosen result page or continue searching; stopping on a generic results page without checking the candidate's rating/reviews is a missed-constraint failure.

The high-detail inspection explicitly marks 'caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza', 'more than 40 reviews', and 'rating of at least 4.5 stars' as not visible, so there is no direct evidence that the hard constraints were verified or satisfied before exit.
The agent exits immediately after reaching the partial search results page, without opening the candidate or continuing to verify a recipe that meets the required ingredient and quality thresholds.

result.regression_rule: When a task specifies a recipe plus minimum rating and review-count thresholds, the agent must verify those thresholds on the chosen result page or continue searching; stopping on a generic results page without checking the candidate's rating/reviews is a missed-constraint failure.
